memoryArtifacts.headline: Baron Hugh Dacre According to Wiki
memoryArtifacts.description: Hugh Dacre, 4th Baron Dacre (1335–1383) was an English nobleman. He was born in 1335, the youngest son of Ralph Dacre, 1st Baron Dacre and his wife Margaret de Multon, 2nd Baroness Multon of Gilsland. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Dacre於大約1335年出生在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德時，他的父親Ranulph Dacre46歲，母親Margaret Multon36歲。他於1355年6月與Elizabeth Maxwell在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1383年12月24日享年49歲，埋葬在英國波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Dacre于大约1335年出生在英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德时，他的父亲Ranulph Dacre46岁，母亲Margaret Multon36岁。他于1355年6月与Elizabeth Maxwell在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1383年12月24日享年49岁，埋葬在英国波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Dacre was born about 1335, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, his father, Ranulph Dacre, was 46 and his mother, Margaret Multon, was 36. He married Elizabeth Maxwell in June 1355, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 24 December 1383, at the age of 49, and was buried in Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Dacre est né environ 1335, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph Dacre, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margaret Multon, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Maxwell en juin 1355, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1383, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Dacre um 1335 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph Dacre 46 und seine Mutter Margaret Multon 36. Er hat im Juni 1355 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1383 im Alter von 49 Jahren und wurde in Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Dacre è nato il circa 1335 nel Gilsland, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Ranulph Dacre, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Multon, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Maxwell nel giugno 1355, nel Gilsland, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 dicembre 1383, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Dacreが約1335年にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで生まれた時，父Ranulph Dacreは46歳，母Margaret Multonは36歳であった。1355年6月にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドでElizabeth Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1383年12月24日に49歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Dacre(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph Dacre(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Multon(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1355년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 Elizabeth Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1383년 12월 24일 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Dacre nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph Dacre, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Multon, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Maxwell em junho de 1355, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1383, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Dacre родился около 1335 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Ranulph Dacre было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Multon, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Maxwell июнь 1355 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 24 декабря 1383 г. в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Dacre nació aproximadamente 1335, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph Dacre, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Margaret Multon, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Maxwell en junio de 1355, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1383, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Cumberland, Inglaterra.
